theme_and_tone.web_ui: High-Contrast Functional SaaS - 'Swiss Brutalist' precision mixed with 'Old Money Tech' elegance to frame the luxury templates. Neutral, clear, and highly focused on the video render output. The interface serves as a sophisticated command center.
theme_and_tone.template_marigold: Rustic-Luxe Traditional Indian - Warm, earthy, festive. Burnt orange and gold dominant with sage and butter yellow accents.
theme_and_tone.template_midnight: Dark Romance Luxury - Cinematic, mysterious, high-fashion. Deep midnight shades, true black, with striking white and metallic gold typography.

headings.usage: Dashboard titles, form section headers. High tension, bold presence.

body.usage: Form inputs, labels, standard dashboard text. Clean and technical.

headings.style: Elegant, traditional serif for the couple's names and event titles.

body.style: Clean sans-serif for dates, venues, and schedule details.

headings.style: Editorial, high-fashion serif with sharp contrast for names and quotes.

body.style: Modern geometric sans for secondary event details.

visual_enhancers.dashboard_surfaces: Use 'Neumorphism (Tactile Variant)' for the form controls. Flat background with a sharp 1px border (border-black/10). Add a 4px soft shadow on hover.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For the sticky dashboard header or video preview floating actions, use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with a border-b border-black/5. DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md solid black primary buttons (bg-primary text-primary-foreground) with a subtle hover:-translate-y-0.5 transform and shadow-md.
visual_enhancers.video_player_container: Give the video preview pane a 'Grid Borders' technical look. A deep dark wrapper that creates a strong frame, making the vertical 9:16 video pop.

component_name_and_styles.TemplatePicker: Bento grid style cards (col-span-1 each). Active state needs a heavy border-black ring-1 ring-black selection state. Embed visual swatches (Marigold vs Midnight) in the cards.
component_name_and_styles.CoupleDetailsForm: Shadcn based forms. Use generous spacing (gap-6 or gap-8). Labels must be uppercase and widely tracked (tracking-[0.1em] text-xs). Use full width inputs.
component_name_and_styles.EventScheduleBuilder: Dynamic list with Framer Motion. Add/Remove buttons should be subdued icons to avoid clutter. Wrap each event item in a p-4 border border-border rounded-md card.
component_name_and_styles.VideoPreviewPane: Sticky on desktop (sticky top-8). Centered 9:16 aspect ratio container (aspect-[9/16] w-full max-w-[320px]). Includes a 'Render Video' highly visible CTA button.
component_name_and_styles.ProgressIndicator: Since renders take minutes, use a highly visual animated progress state. A 'Tracing Beam' border or shimmering loading overlay over the video pane keeps the user engaged.

grids_and_layouts.main_dashboard: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol (High Density). Use grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12. Form column: lg:col-span-8. Preview column: lg:col-span-4.
grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Generous spacing. p-8 for sections. gap-8 between logical form blocks. Inputs have py-3 px-4 for tactile clicking.

motion_and_interactions.web_ui: Use framer-motion for schedule items (entrance opacity-0 y-4, exit opacity-0 scale-95). Button clicks should have a satisfying scale-95 tap state. The render button must show an active spinner/morphing loader.
motion_and_interactions.video_motion_marigold: For the Remotion template: Smooth, flowing transitions. Floating particles (like marigold petals). Text reveals via slow mask-image wipes or elegant upwards fade-ins.
motion_and_interactions.video_motion_midnight: For the Remotion template: Dramatic, cinematic motion. Slow scale-ins (Ken Burns effect) on dark photos. High-contrast text flashes or sharp tracking-in animations (letters expanding).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure form labels vs inputs meet 4.5:1. Primary black buttons with white text pass easily. Dark text on light backgrounds for the web UI.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: Apply data-testid attributes extensively: template-selector-marigold, template-selector-midnight, partner1-input, partner2-input, render-video-btn, add-event-btn, event-name-input.

marigold_theme_dummies.description: Indian couple in traditional attire posing outdoors

midnight_theme_dummies.description: Bride and groom standing in a dark room

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React frontend representing the 'DreamWedds' SaaS internal demo dashboard.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, tabs, and buttons. Heavily customize the spacing and typography to match the 'Swiss Brutalist' and 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic.
Implement the two-column grid layout (Form on left 8-cols, Sticky Preview/Render on right 4-cols).
Include a complex form with dynamic fields for the 'Event Schedule Builder' (allowing adding/removing Haldi, Sangeet, etc.).
Mock the video rendering API call with a long-running Promise (e.g., 3-5 seconds for demo purposes) and display a sophisticated loading state on the 'Render' button.
For the Video Preview player placeholder, ensure it's locked to a vertical 9:16 aspect ratio (e.g., aspect-[9/16]).
Make sure to embed structural hints for the two video themes (Marigold vs Midnight) in the UI state so that the backend gets the exact requested template.
Use lucide-react for all iconography in the dashboard.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
